briefdescription.para: Get the major part of the littlefs disk version.

parameterdescription.para: The disk version of littlefs partition

simplesect.para: The major part of the littlefs disk version.

briefdescription.para: Get the minor part of the littlefs disk version.

parameterdescription.para: The disk version of littlefs partition

simplesect.para: The minor part of the littlefs disk version.

memberdef.name: FS_LITTLEFS_DECLARE_CUSTOM_CONFIG
memberdef.initializer: static uint8_t __aligned(alignment) name ## _read_buffer[cache_sz]; \ static uint8_t __aligned(alignment) name ## _prog_buffer[cache_sz]; \ static uint32_t name ## _lookahead_buffer[(lookahead_sz) / sizeof(uint32_t)]; \ static struct fs_littlefs name = { \ .cfg = { \ .read_size = (read_sz), \ .prog_size = (prog_sz), \ .cache_size = (cache_sz), \ .lookahead_size = (lookahead_sz), \ .read_buffer = name ## _read_buffer, \ .prog_buffer = name ## _prog_buffer, \ .lookahead_buffer = name ## _lookahead_buffer, \ }, \ }

briefdescription.para: Define a littlefs configuration with customized size characteristics.

detaileddescription.para: This defines static arrays required for caches, and initializes the littlefs configuration structure to use the provided values instead of the global Kconfig defaults. A pointer to the named object must be stored in the fs_mount_t::fs_data field of a fs_mount_t object.
To define an instance for the Kconfig defaults, use FS_LITTLEFS_DECLARE_DEFAULT_CONFIG.

To completely control file system configuration the application can directly define and initialize a fs_littlefs object. The application is responsible for ensuring the configured values are consistent with littlefs requirements.

simplesect.para: If you use a non-default configuration for cache size, you must also select CONFIG_FS_LITTLEFS_FC_HEAP_SIZE to relax the size constraints on per-file cache allocations.

parameterdescription.para: the name for the structure. The defined object has file scope.
needed alignment for read/prog buffer for specific device

briefdescription.para: Define a littlefs configuration with default characteristics.

detaileddescription.para: This defines static arrays and initializes the littlefs configuration structure to use the default size configuration provided by Kconfig.

parameterdescription.para: the name for the structure. The defined object has file scope.
